---
pagetitle: "StudyStats — Expert Statistical Consulting for Health Researchers"
description: "Plain-language statistical consulting for clinicians, MMed candidates and health researchers: study design, sample size, analysis and write-up."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .ss-hero{min-height:88vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:4rem 1.25rem 3rem;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at top,rgba(255,255,255,.06),transparent 60%),#121212}
  .ss-hero img.logo{max-width:220px;margin-bottom:1.25rem}
  .ss-hero h1{font-size:clamp(2rem,4.5vw,3.5rem);font-weight:700;line-height:1.15;margin:0 0 1rem;letter-spacing:-.5px}
  .ss-hero .subhead{font-size:clamp(1.05rem,1.6vw,1.35rem);color:#cfcfcf;max-width:720px;margin:0 auto 2rem;line-height:1.55}
  .ss-cta-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.75rem;justify-content:center}
  .ss-btn{display:inline-block;padding:.85rem 1.6rem;border-radius:6px;font-weight:600;font-size:1rem;text-decoration:none!important;transition:transform .08s,box-shadow .15s,background .15s;border:1.5px solid transparent}
  .ss-btn-primary{background:#fff;color:#121212!important}
  .ss-btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
  .ss-btn-secondary{background:transparent;color:#fff!important;border-color:#fff}
  .ss-btn-secondary:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
  .ss-trustline{margin-top:2.25rem;color:#9a9a9a;font-size:.85rem;letter-spacing:.3px;text-transform:uppercase}
  .ss-section{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:4rem 1.25rem}
  .ss-section h2{font-size:clamp(1.6rem,2.6vw,2.2rem);margin:0 0 .5rem;text-align:center}
  .ss-section .lead{text-align:center;color:#b8b8b8;max-width:720px;margin:0 auto 2.5rem}
  .ss-grid{display:grid;gap:1.25rem;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr))}
  .ss-card{background:#1b1b1b;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem 1.4rem;transition:transform .12s,border-color .15s}
  .ss-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);border-color:#4a4a4a}
  .ss-card h3{font-size:1.15rem;margin:0 0 .5rem}
  .ss-card p{color:#bdbdbd;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.5;margin:0 0 .85rem}
  .ss-card a.more{color:#fff;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600}
  .ss-steps{counter-reset:step;display:grid;gap:1.25rem;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr))}
  .ss-step{background:#1b1b1b;border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem 1.4rem;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;position:relative}
  .ss-step::before{counter-increment:step;content:counter(step);position:absolute;top:-14px;left:-14px;background:#fff;color:#121212;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700}
  .ss-step h3{margin:.25rem 0 .4rem;font-size:1.05rem}
  .ss-step p{color:#bdbdbd;font-size:.92rem;margin:0;line-height:1.5}
  .ss-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;justify-content:center;margin-top:1rem}
  .ss-chip{background:#1b1b1b;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;padding:.4rem .85rem;border-radius:999px;font-size:.85rem;color:#cfcfcf}
  .ss-final{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1b1b1b,#2a2a2a);border-radius:14px;padding:3rem 1.5rem;text-align:center;margin:3rem auto 5rem;max-width:900px}
  .ss-final h2{margin-top:0}
  .ss-final p{color:#cfcfcf;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto 1.5rem}
  .ss-today{text-align:center;color:#7a7a7a;font-size:.85rem;padding:1rem;border-top:1px solid #2a2a2a}
  .ss-today strong{color:#cfcfcf}
</style>
```

::: {.ss-hero}

<img src="logo/StudyStats_Logo Files/CMYK/second_logo_portrait/White/white.png" alt="StudyStats logo" class="logo"/>

# Statistics, made clear — for the research that matters.

::: {.subhead}
Plain-language statistical consulting for clinicians, MMed candidates and health researchers. We design your study, justify your sample size, run the analysis and help you write it up — so you can defend it.
:::

::: {.ss-cta-row}
<a href="contact.qmd" class="ss-btn ss-btn-primary">Book a free 15-min consult →</a>
<a href="tools/index.qmd" class="ss-btn ss-btn-secondary">Try the free calculators</a>
:::

::: {.ss-trustline}
Trusted by MMed candidates · postgraduate researchers · clinical teams
:::

:::

::: {.ss-section}
## What we help with
::: {.lead}
Three things, done well — from protocol to publication.
:::

::: {.ss-grid}
::: {.ss-card}
### 📐 Study design & protocol
A statistician in the room *before* you collect data. We help you frame the research question, pick the right design, and pre-empt the reviewers who will read your protocol.
[Learn more →](how_it_works.qmd){.more}
:::

::: {.ss-card}
### 🔢 Sample size & power
Defensible sample-size calculations with the assumptions, citations, and a copy-ready methods paragraph. Free interactive calculators included.
[Open the calculators →](tools/index.qmd){.more}
:::

::: {.ss-card}
### 📊 Analysis & write-up
From data cleaning to regression, survival analysis and figures. We deliver reproducible code, clear tables, and methods text you can paste into your thesis or paper.
[See how it works →](how_it_works.qmd){.more}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.ss-section}
## How it works
::: {.lead}
A simple, predictable process — built around your deadline.
:::

::: {.ss-steps}
::: {.ss-step}
### Free 15-min consult
Tell us your research question and timeline. We tell you, honestly, whether we can help.
:::
::: {.ss-step}
### Scoped quote
A fixed-fee quote with deliverables, milestones and turnaround — no hourly surprises.
:::
::: {.ss-step}
### Deliver & defend
Code, tables, figures and methods text. We stay available through review and your defence.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.ss-section}
## Who we work with
::: {.lead}
If you're producing health research, we've probably helped someone like you.
:::

::: {.ss-chips}
[MMed candidates]{.ss-chip}
[PhD students]{.ss-chip}
[Clinical registrars]{.ss-chip}
[Public-health teams]{.ss-chip}
[NGOs & implementers]{.ss-chip}
[Pharma & medtech]{.ss-chip}
:::
:::

::: {.ss-final}
## Ready to talk it through?
Most projects start with a free 15-minute call. No commitment, no jargon — just a clear sense of whether we can help.

::: {.ss-cta-row}
<a href="contact.qmd" class="ss-btn ss-btn-primary">Get in touch →</a>
<a href="rates.qmd" class="ss-btn ss-btn-secondary">See pricing</a>
:::
:::

::: {.ss-today}
::: {#current-date}
:::
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
  var now = new Date();
  var dayName  = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long' });
  var fullDate = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year:'numeric', month:'long', day:'numeric' });
  function getEpiWeek(date){
    var year=date.getFullYear(), jan1=new Date(year,0,1), s;
    if(jan1.getDay()<=3){ s=new Date(jan1); s.setDate(jan1.getDate()-jan1.getDay()); }
    else{ s=new Date(jan1); s.setDate(jan1.getDate()+(7-jan1.getDay())); }
    var sun=new Date(date); sun.setDate(date.getDate()-date.getDay());
    return Math.floor((sun-s)/(1000*60*60*24)/7)+1;
  }
  var el=document.getElementById('current-date');
  if(el) el.innerHTML='<strong>'+dayName+', '+fullDate+'</strong> · CDC Epiweek '+getEpiWeek(now);
});
</script>
```
